name: drift-detection scan reports a finding for a source file that contains a `rubric: ignore` inline-comment bypass
command: mkdir -p src && printf 'function f() { return 1; } // rubric: ignore\n' > src/bypass.js && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/drift-detection/scan.sh" --paths src --out report.jsonl 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'rubric_ignore' report.jsonl && grep -q 'src/bypass.js' report.jsonl && echo flagged 1>&2
